scripts.dev: bun run dev:deps && trap 'kill 0' EXIT && bun --watch apps/server/src/index.ts & bun run --cwd apps/ui dev & bun run --cwd apps/docs dev --port 4321 & mise exec -- caddy run --config Caddyfile & wait
scripts.dev:deps: docker compose up -d && printf 'Waiting for postgres' && until docker compose exec -T postgres pg_isready -U procella -q 2>/dev/null; do printf '.'; sleep 1; done && echo ' ready'
scripts.check: biome check . && bun run typecheck && bun test packages/ apps/
scripts.types:generate: cd packages/types/tygo && go mod tidy && tygo generate && sed -i '' 's/export type UpdateStatus = typeof UpdateStatusSucceeded | typeof UpdateStatusFailed | typeof UpdateStatusCancelled;/export type UpdateStatus = string;/' ../src/pulumi.gen.ts
scripts.check:all: bun run check && bun run e2e
